---
title: "StreamCurves — Geomorphic Reference Curve Analysis"
subtitle: "Interactive Dashboard"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    theme: cosmo
    page-layout: full
    self-contained: true
    code-fold: true
    code-summary: "Show code"
params:
  run_dir: "../outputs/run_latest"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(reactable)
library(htmltools)

# Find most recent run directory if run_latest doesn't exist
run_dir <- params$run_dir
if (!dir.exists(run_dir)) {
  all_runs <- list.dirs("../outputs", recursive = FALSE, full.names = TRUE)
  all_runs <- sort(all_runs, decreasing = TRUE)
  if (length(all_runs) > 0) {
    run_dir <- all_runs[1]
  }
}

tables_dir <- file.path(run_dir, "tables")
plots_dir  <- file.path(run_dir, "plots")

# Helper to safely read CSV
safe_read <- function(path) {
  if (file.exists(path)) readr::read_csv(path, show_col_types = FALSE)
  else tibble::tibble()
}
```

## Overview {.tabset}

### Overview

**Run Directory:** `r run_dir`

```{r overview}
manifest_path <- file.path(run_dir, "manifest", "run_manifest.json")
if (file.exists(manifest_path)) {
  manifest <- jsonlite::read_json(manifest_path)
  cat("Run ID:", manifest$run_id, "\n")
  cat("Timestamp:", manifest$timestamp, "\n")
  cat("R Version:", manifest$r_version, "\n")
}
```

### Data QA

```{r data-qa}
precheck <- safe_read(file.path(tables_dir, "metric_precheck.csv"))
if (nrow(precheck) > 0) {
  reactable::reactable(
    precheck,
    filterable = TRUE, searchable = TRUE, striped = TRUE,
    defaultPageSize = 25,
    columns = list(
      precheck_status = colDef(
        style = function(value) {
          color <- switch(value, pass = "green", caution = "orange", fail = "red", "gray")
          list(color = color, fontWeight = "bold")
        }
      )
    )
  )
}
```

### Stratification

```{r stratification}
strat_results <- safe_read(file.path(tables_dir, "stratification_screening.csv"))
if (nrow(strat_results) > 0) {
  reactable::reactable(
    strat_results,
    filterable = TRUE, searchable = TRUE, striped = TRUE,
    defaultPageSize = 25,
    columns = list(
      p_value = colDef(format = colFormat(digits = 4)),
      classification = colDef(
        style = function(value) {
          color <- if (grepl("selected", value)) "green" else if (grepl("rejected", value)) "red" else "gray"
          list(color = color, fontWeight = "bold")
        }
      )
    )
  )
}
```

#### Stratification Decisions

```{r strat-decisions}
strat_dec <- safe_read(file.path(tables_dir, "stratification_decisions.csv"))
if (nrow(strat_dec) > 0) {
  reactable::reactable(strat_dec, filterable = TRUE, striped = TRUE)
}
```

### Model Selection

```{r model-selection}
model_sel <- safe_read(file.path(tables_dir, "model_selections.csv"))
if (nrow(model_sel) > 0) {
  reactable::reactable(
    model_sel,
    filterable = TRUE, searchable = TRUE, striped = TRUE,
    columns = list(
      adj_r2 = colDef(format = colFormat(digits = 3)),
      bic = colDef(format = colFormat(digits = 1)),
      needs_review = colDef(
        style = function(value) {
          if (isTRUE(value)) list(color = "orange", fontWeight = "bold")
          else list()
        }
      )
    )
  )
}
```

### Diagnostics

```{r diagnostics}
diag_summary <- safe_read(file.path(tables_dir, "diagnostic_summary.csv"))
if (nrow(diag_summary) > 0) {
  reactable::reactable(
    diag_summary,
    filterable = TRUE, searchable = TRUE, striped = TRUE,
    columns = list(
      overall_status = colDef(
        style = function(value) {
          color <- switch(value, pass = "green", caution = "orange", fail = "red", "gray")
          list(color = color, fontWeight = "bold")
        }
      )
    )
  )
}
```

### Reference Curves

```{r reference-curves}
ref_curves <- safe_read(file.path(tables_dir, "reference_curves.csv"))
if (nrow(ref_curves) > 0) {
  reactable::reactable(
    ref_curves,
    filterable = TRUE, searchable = TRUE, striped = TRUE,
    columns = list(
      q25 = colDef(format = colFormat(digits = 1)),
      q75 = colDef(format = colFormat(digits = 1))
    )
  )
}
```

### Cross-Metric

```{r cross-metric}
redundancy <- safe_read(file.path(tables_dir, "metric_redundancy_results.csv"))
if (nrow(redundancy) > 0) {
  reactable::reactable(
    redundancy |> dplyr::filter(abs_pearson > 0.5),
    filterable = TRUE, searchable = TRUE, striped = TRUE,
    columns = list(
      pearson_r = colDef(format = colFormat(digits = 3)),
      redundant_flag = colDef(
        style = function(value) {
          if (isTRUE(value)) list(color = "red", fontWeight = "bold") else list()
        }
      )
    )
  )
}
```

### Regional Curves

```{r regional-curves}
regional <- safe_read(file.path(tables_dir, "regional_curves_results.csv"))
if (nrow(regional) > 0) {
  reactable::reactable(
    regional,
    filterable = TRUE, searchable = TRUE, striped = TRUE,
    columns = list(
      r_squared = colDef(format = colFormat(digits = 3)),
      coefficient_a = colDef(format = colFormat(digits = 4)),
      exponent_b = colDef(format = colFormat(digits = 3))
    )
  )
}
```

### Run Info

```{r run-info}
log_df <- safe_read(file.path(run_dir, "logs", "pipeline_log.csv"))
if (nrow(log_df) > 0) {
  reactable::reactable(log_df, striped = TRUE)
}
```
